scripts.build: shx rm -rf build/ && vp build && npm run copy-libav && npm run copy-libass && npm run copy-html
scripts.copy-libav: shx cp node_modules/libav-wasm/build/worker.js build/libav-worker.js && shx cp node_modules/libav-wasm/build/libav.wasm build/libav.wasm
scripts.copy-libass: shx cp node_modules/jassub/dist/jassub-worker.js build/jassub-worker.js && shx cp node_modules/jassub/dist/jassub-worker.wasm build/jassub-worker.wasm && shx cp node_modules/jassub/dist/jassub-worker-modern.wasm build/jassub-worker-modern.wasm && shx cp node_modules/jassub/dist/default.woff2 build/default.woff2
scripts.copy-html: shx cp src/index.html build/index.html && shx cp src/app.webmanifest build/app.webmanifest && copyfiles -u 2 ./src/assets/* build/assets
